questions.question: Describe the importance of controlling extraneous variables in an experiment. (6 marks)

A researcher wants to investigate the effect of two factors (A and B) on a response variable. Factor A has three levels and factor B has four levels. If the researcher wants to conduct a factorial experiment, how many experimental runs will be required to estimate the two-factor interaction? (10 marks)
What is the main assumption of ANOVA that relates to the distribution of the data? (5 marks)
